description: Create a GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs, one for Linux and one for Windows. The Linux job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix strategy for different build types, compilers, and C++ libraries, while the Windows job runs on windows-latest with a matrix for different architectures and configurations. For each job, check out the repository, install build dependencies, configure and build with CMake, install the build output, and run tests with ctest.
